case_title: BLU JASON VASS BRYAN VS. DISCOVER FIN SERVICES LLC

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRYAN, BLU JASON VASS AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER FIN SERVICES LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRYAN, BLU JASON VASS AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER FIN SERVICES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR: AARON WILSON TO APPEAR FOR PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRYAN, BLU JASON VASS

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER FIN SERVICES LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE JUDGMENT IN CSM-16-853974 WHICH IS RES JUDICATA TO PLAINTOFF'S CLAIM IN THE PRESENT CASE. PLAINTIFF BLU JASON VASS BRYAN IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY AARON WILSON, A FRIEND. DEFENDANT DISCOVER FIN SERVICES LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IVY SPENCE, VENDOR ANALYSIS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
